payload.answer: Extracted three durable, source-grounded takeaways about AI memory system design: durable evidence, atomic traceable cards, and database-owned lifecycle/conflict state with semantic index support for recall.
citations: AI memory systems need durable source evidence
Atomic memory cards should be small and traceable
A semantic index can improve recall, but the application database must own lifecycle and conflict state
